context: Tests whether the agent implements the AppLovin purchase postback correctly: using the right URL endpoint, formatting revenue as a decimal, passing AppLovin's proprietary device ID, using server-to-server delivery, and recommending an MMP for production.

checklist.name: Postback URL
checklist.description: Uses the URL https://d.applovin.com/postback/v1/purchase as the endpoint

checklist.name: event_token parameter
checklist.description: Reads the AppLovin postback token from an environment variable (not hardcoded) and passes it as event_token query parameter

checklist.name: event_name=purchase
checklist.description: Sets event_name query parameter to the string 'purchase'

checklist.name: Revenue decimal format
checklist.description: Formats revenue as a decimal string (e.g. using .toFixed(2) or equivalent), NOT as an integer

checklist.name: Required purchase params
checklist.description: Passes user_id, transaction_id (or order_id), and currency as query parameters

checklist.name: AppLovin device ID
checklist.description: Accepts an AppLovin-specific device identifier and passes it as the device_id parameter (in addition to or instead of IDFA/GAID)

checklist.name: Optional IDFA/GAID
checklist.description: Includes IDFA (idfa) and GAID (gaid) as optional parameters, only appending them when present

checklist.name: Server-to-server delivery
checklist.description: architecture-note.md explains that server-side postbacks are preferred over client-side because client-side events can be spoofed and server postbacks give reliable ROAS signal

checklist.name: MMP recommendation
checklist.description: architecture-note.md recommends using an MMP (names at least one of: Adjust, AppsFlyer, Singular) for production to handle deduplication and SKAdNetwork attribution

checklist.name: HTTP error handling
checklist.description: Checks the HTTP response status and throws or returns an error when the postback request fails
